title: Esync Tech SWE Intern
summary: Worked on the deployment side of a research-backed anomaly detection project for cybersecurity monitoring.

sections.heading: What I Worked On
items: containerized an anomalous log-detection model for repeatable deployment and testing
deployed the containerized service using Microsoft Azure tooling
supported a research team exploring data breach detection and NLP-based cybersecurity methods
helped connect model output to system-log monitoring workflows
worked on making the research prototype easier to run, observe, and iterate on outside a local development environment
contributed to the final technical presentation explaining the model, deployment flow, and cybersecurity monitoring use case
